code.description: Machine-readable error code. Stable across versions; safe to switch on.

details.description: Optional structured context — field paths, retry-after seconds, etc.

code.description: Stable machine code. Per-row: `INVALID_NAME`. Whole-request (every row carries it): `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `TIER_FEATURE_REQUIRED`, `COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE`.

name.description: The row's requested name, echoed for failed rows.

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

targetUrl.description: The row's target URL, echoed so the caller can name the failed row.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

code.description: Stable machine code. For bulk create: `INVALID_URL`, `URL_TOO_LONG`, `PATH_TAKEN`, `PATH_TOO_SHORT`, `PATH_TOO_DEEP`, `PATH_INVALID_FORMAT`, `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`, `DOMAIN_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`, `DOMAIN_REQUIRES_UPGRADE` (per-row); `WORKSPACE_NOT_MEMBER`, `READ_ONLY`, `COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND`, `COLLECTION_NOT_MANUAL`, `BULK_TOO_LARGE` (whole-request — every row carries the same error).

rules.description: Rules for smart collections returned by the API; `null` for normal collections.

type.description: Collection kind. API-created collections are `manual`; smart collections may be returned when they already exist.

rules.description: Rules for smart collections returned by the API; `null` for normal collections.

type.description: Collection kind. API-created collections are `manual`; smart collections may be returned when they already exist.

materialized.description: Number of current matching links captured in the collection.

attribution.description: Which attribution the link CARRIES: utm = a utm_* param on its destination URL; signals = a QR code carries signals; any = carries either (spoken to a user as "Either").

clicked.description: Last-click recency window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Links never clicked match nothing.

clicks.description: Total-click threshold: {op: greaterThan|lessThan, value: <whole number>}, e.g. {op: greaterThan, value: 100} for more than 100 clicks.

created.description: Creation-time window: within the last 1h, 24h, 7d, or 30d.

createdVia.description: How the link was created: web, import, chat, or api.

edited.description: Last-edit window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Creation counts as the initial edit.

hasCollection.description: true = in at least one collection; false = uncollected.

negate.description: Filter names to INVERT, each still AND-combined. e.g. status:'active' + negate:['status'] means 'not active'; clicked:'30d' + negate:['clicked'] means 'not clicked in the last 30 days'.

query.description: Free text matched against each link's short path, title, and destination URL.

schedule.description: upcoming = has an activation/deactivation still to fire; completed = schedule fully in the past. Unscheduled links match neither.

shortDomain.description: The link's OWN domain (its short-link host, e.g. zbrah.link) as hostnames. User-facing word: "domain" / "short domain".

status.description: active = live right now; inactive = off (manually or by schedule). Schedule-aware.

targetHost.description: Where the link POINTS, its destination host (e.g. cnn.com), as hostnames. User-facing word: "destination" (never say "target host" to a user).

uniqueClicks.description: Unique-visitor (distinct) threshold, same shape as clicks.

rulesSummary.description: Plain-language echo of the compiled membership. Present only for smart collections (e.g. "Destination is any of cnn.com and Status is active").

source.description: `custom` when the caller supplied `path`; `auto` when the path was allocated.

targetReachable.description: Advisory reachability of `targetUrl`: `true` if it resolved to a live page, `false` if unreachable, `null` when not checked. Only probed when the request passes `?verify=true`. Never blocks creation — a link is always returned. (401/403 count as reachable.)

hostname.description: Domain hostname for creating short links.

tier.description: Access tier for platform domains; `null` for custom domains.

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

render.description: Present when `deep=1` — the image rasterizer rendered.

clicks.description: Lifetime click total. Present on list rows when the request used a click-based `sort` or `include=clicks`.

description.description: User-authored description (not the scraped page metadata).

fallback.description: Where a visitor goes when the link is off. `null` inherits the domain default, then the system default (a branded inactive page). `target_root` redirects to the destination's root domain; `url` redirects to an explicit URL.

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

lastClickedAt.description: Most recent click; `null` = never clicked. Present alongside `clicks`.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

LinkFilter.description: Link filter. All fields optional; dimensions AND-combine, arrays OR within a dimension. `shortDomain` is the link's own domain (say "domain"); `targetHost` is where it points (say "destination"). `negate` inverts the named structured dimensions.

attribution.description: Which attribution the link CARRIES: utm = a utm_* param on its destination URL; signals = a QR code carries signals; any = carries either (spoken to a user as "Either").

clicked.description: Last-click recency window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Links never clicked match nothing.

clicks.description: Total-click threshold: {op: greaterThan|lessThan, value: <whole number>}, e.g. {op: greaterThan, value: 100} for more than 100 clicks.

created.description: Creation-time window: within the last 1h, 24h, 7d, or 30d.

createdVia.description: How the link was created: web, import, chat, or api.

edited.description: Last-edit window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Creation counts as the initial edit.

hasCollection.description: true = in at least one collection; false = uncollected.

negate.description: Filter names to INVERT, each still AND-combined. e.g. status:'active' + negate:['status'] means 'not active'; clicked:'30d' + negate:['clicked'] means 'not clicked in the last 30 days'.

query.description: Free text matched against each link's short path, title, and destination URL.

schedule.description: upcoming = has an activation/deactivation still to fire; completed = schedule fully in the past. Unscheduled links match neither.

shortDomain.description: The link's OWN domain (its short-link host, e.g. zbrah.link) as hostnames. User-facing word: "domain" / "short domain".

status.description: active = live right now; inactive = off (manually or by schedule). Schedule-aware.

targetHost.description: Where the link POINTS, its destination host (e.g. cnn.com), as hostnames. User-facing word: "destination" (never say "target host" to a user).

uniqueClicks.description: Unique-visitor (distinct) threshold, same shape as clicks.

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

clicks.description: Lifetime click total. Present on list rows when the request used a click-based `sort` or `include=clicks`.

description.description: User-authored description (not the scraped page metadata).

fallback.description: Where a visitor goes when the link is off. `null` inherits the domain default, then the system default (a branded inactive page). `target_root` redirects to the destination's root domain; `url` redirects to an explicit URL.

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

lastClickedAt.description: Most recent click; `null` = never clicked. Present alongside `clicks`.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. `null` when there are no more pages.

allOf.description: The space-wide default style — what a link with no saved variants renders. Null = the stock look.

accessibleSpaces.description: Spaces this API key can act on. An all-scope key returns every space the user is a member of; a selected-scope key returns only the allowlisted spaces.

prefix.description: First ~8 characters of the key, safe to log.

allOf.description: Stable public image URLs for the design — key-free, CDN-served, safe to embed in an tag or hand to third parties. Saving the design rewrites the same files in place, so each URL always serves the latest saved look (CDN propagation: usually under a minute, up to a few minutes). For a copy frozen in time, download the file instead.

variantId.description: The design behind the URLs; null when the link has no saved variants (the zero-variant default look exported instead — its files refresh per export, not on space-default changes).

QrImageUrls.description: The design's stable public image URLs; null until first materialization (e.g. no file storage configured). POST the link's `/qr/export` endpoint to materialize on demand.

QrSignals.description: The code's signal map (tag key → value). Signals ride the QR payload as plain query params, are read at scan time, and are stripped before the redirect — the destination never sees them. Keys `src` and `qrv` are reserved.

QrVariantStyle.description: Sparse QR design vocabulary. Omitted fields inherit defaults; gradients are two-stop with degree rotations; branding draws a center mark (favicon of the destination, or an uploaded image).

QueryAnalyticsInput.description: Analytics query, two halves. Object SCOPE — WHICH links to count clicks for — uses the same vocabulary as link search: `status`, `created`, `edited`, `createdVia`, `hasCollection`, `schedule`, `attribution`, `targetHost`, `query`, plus the identity scopes `linkId` / `collectionId` (one link OR one collection OR attributes, never combined) and `negate` (invert named scope dims). Click MEASUREMENT — `country`/`continents`/`region`/`city`, `browser`/`os`/`deviceType`, `referrerDomain`, `fromQr`, bot dims — filters the clicks. `groupBy` returns a breakdown (one row per value), `measure` counts clicks or uniqueClicks, `range` sets the window. All fields optional; an empty body is whole-workspace all-time totals.

attribution.description: Which attribution the link CARRIES: utm = a utm_* param on its destination URL; signals = a QR code carries signals; any = carries either (spoken to a user as "Either").

collectionId.description: Scope to one specific collection (analytics-only). Mutually exclusive with the object-attribute filters and with linkId.

continents.description: Named continent groupings; expand to their countries.

country.description: ISO country codes of the click (e.g. US, GB).

created.description: Creation-time window: within the last 1h, 24h, 7d, or 30d.

createdVia.description: How the link was created: web, import, chat, or api.

edited.description: Last-edit window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Creation counts as the initial edit.

from.description: Custom window start as an ISO date or date-time. Only with range=custom.

fromQr.description: true = QR scans only; false = ordinary (non-QR) clicks only.

groupBy.description: Break the result down by this dimension (one row per value); omit for a single total. `day` is a per-day time series.

hasCollection.description: true = in at least one collection; false = uncollected.

isBot.description: true = automated traffic only; false = humans only.

linkId.description: Scope to one specific link by its id (analytics-only) — the click counterpart to opening that link's dashboard. Mutually exclusive with the object-attribute filters and with collectionId. Click dimensions (country, browser, …) still apply on top.

measure.description: What to count: total clicks (default) or unique visitors.

negate.description: Object-scope dimensions to invert, e.g. ["status"] for clicks from links that are NOT active. Free text is not negatable.

query.description: Free text matched against each link's short path, title, and destination URL.

range.description: Time window: all (all-time, the default), 7d, 30d, 1d (last 24h), 1h, 15m, or custom (then set from/to). Use a rolling window like 7d for 'this week' / 30d for 'last 30 days'.

schedule.description: upcoming = has an activation/deactivation still to fire; completed = schedule fully in the past. Unscheduled links match neither.

shortDomain.description: The link's own short-domain host(s) the click came through, as hostnames.

status.description: active = live right now; inactive = off (manually or by schedule). Schedule-aware.

targetHost.description: Where the link POINTS, its destination host (e.g. cnn.com), as hostnames. User-facing word: "destination" (never say "target host" to a user).

to.description: Custom window end as an ISO date or date-time. Only with range=custom.

configured.description: false = the analytics backend isn't configured for this space; `rows` is empty.

groupBy.description: The breakdown dimension, or null for a single total.

key.description: The dimension value (or calendar day) for a breakdown row; null for a single total.

tooLarge.description: true = the link scope was too large to resolve; relay the message, never report zero.

QueryLinksInput.description: Link filter. All fields optional; dimensions AND-combine, arrays OR within a dimension. `shortDomain` is the link's own domain (say "domain"); `targetHost` is where it points (say "destination"). `negate` inverts the named structured dimensions.

total.description: Total links matching the filter (uncapped; `links` is the page).

hostname.description: Domain hostname for this short link.

path.description: Path component for this short link.

shortUrl.description: Canonical short link URL for display, copy, and navigation.

pathChanged.description: `true` when the patch contained a `path` that differed from the current value.

apiKey.description: Space-scoped API key. Provision via the dashboard; pass as `Authorization: Bearer zeb_…`.

info.description: Public REST API for Zebra. Use bearer API keys to manage spaces, links, collections, and short domains.
info.title: Zebra API

get.description: Returns `{ ok: true, api: 'v1' }`. Public — no auth. Use for uptime monitoring and to verify the API surface is reachable. With `?deep=1` it also exercises the QR image rasterizer and returns `render: 'ok'` (500 with `render: 'failed'` when the renderer can't load).

parameters.description: Set to `1` to run the deep render probe.
parameters.name: deep

schema.description: Set to `1` to run the deep render probe.

200.description: Service is reachable (and, with deep=1, rendering works).

500.description: Deep probe only: the image rasterizer failed to load or render.

get.description: Returns the user the API key acts as, the spaces the key is authorized for, and the key's own metadata. Useful for client-side key introspection: "who am I, what can I do?"

post.description: Filter and group CLICK analytics over a scoped set of links — the click counterpart to /links/query. POST because of the nested/array-valued filters. An empty body returns whole-workspace, all-time totals. Omit `groupBy` for a single total; set it for a breakdown (one row per value), ranked by `measure` (clicks or uniqueClicks). A too-large scope or an unconfigured backend is a flag in the 200 body, never a 4xx. Requires the ANALYTICS_VIEW plan feature; weighs more than a plain read against the per-minute rate budget.

botTraffic.summary: The full traffic mix (humans + bots) by traffic type

clicksForStaleActiveLinks.summary: Clicks by browser for active links NOT clicked in 30 days

topCountriesThisWeek.summary: Top countries in the last 7 days

200.description: Aggregate rows, or a configured/tooLarge flag.

400.description: Unknown domain in the filter, or invalid JSON.

402.description: The space's plan does not include analytics.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

422.description: Validation failed, `query` in `negate`, or `collectionId` combined with attribute filters.

get.description: Returns every collection in the space, capped at 100 by plan limits, with each collection's current `linkCount`. Smart collections calculate `linkCount` from their current matching links. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`; same vocabulary as the link lists); click-based sorts use the collection's current links.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

post.description: Creates a collection. Default (`type` omitted or `manual`) is an empty manual group; add links with `POST /collections/{collectionId}/links`. Pass `type:"smart"` with a `filter` (the LinkFilter vocabulary) to create a LIVE, rule-based collection whose membership stays current — its contents match a `queryLinks` call with the same filter. A smart body needs at least one filter and returns a `rulesSummary`.

smart.summary: Smart collection: everything pointing at cnn.com

attribution.description: Which attribution the link CARRIES: utm = a utm_* param on its destination URL; signals = a QR code carries signals; any = carries either (spoken to a user as "Either").

clicked.description: Last-click recency window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Links never clicked match nothing.

clicks.description: Total-click threshold: {op: greaterThan|lessThan, value: <whole number>}, e.g. {op: greaterThan, value: 100} for more than 100 clicks.

created.description: Creation-time window: within the last 1h, 24h, 7d, or 30d.

createdVia.description: How the link was created: web, import, chat, or api.

edited.description: Last-edit window (1h|24h|7d|30d). Creation counts as the initial edit.

hasCollection.description: true = in at least one collection; false = uncollected.

negate.description: Filter names to INVERT, each still AND-combined. e.g. status:'active' + negate:['status'] means 'not active'; clicked:'30d' + negate:['clicked'] means 'not clicked in the last 30 days'.

query.description: Free text matched against each link's short path, title, and destination URL.

schedule.description: upcoming = has an activation/deactivation still to fire; completed = schedule fully in the past. Unscheduled links match neither.

shortDomain.description: The link's OWN domain (its short-link host, e.g. zbrah.link) as hostnames. User-facing word: "domain" / "short domain".

status.description: active = live right now; inactive = off (manually or by schedule). Schedule-aware.

targetHost.description: Where the link POINTS, its destination host (e.g. cnn.com), as hostnames. User-facing word: "destination" (never say "target host" to a user).

uniqueClicks.description: Unique-visitor (distinct) threshold, same shape as clicks.

400.description: A smart filter named a domain the space doesn't have (`UNKNOWN_DOMAIN`).

402.description: Space is read-only, collection limit reached, or tier doesn't include the collections feature.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

422.description: Validation failed, or a smart body produced an empty rule set (`EMPTY_RULES`).

post.description: Creates up to 50 normal collections in one request. Names do not have to be unique within a space. The collection cap is enforced all-or-nothing: if the batch would push the space over its limit, none are created (`COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED`).

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; 207 (Multi-Status) when partially successful. Inspect each row's `success`.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; 207 (Multi-Status) when partially successful. Inspect each row's `success`.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

post.summary: Create many collections in one request

delete.description: Permanently deletes the collection. Links in the collection are not deleted.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

get.description: Returns one collection, including its current `linkCount`. A collectionId in a different space returns 404.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

patch.description: Updates `name` or `description`. Rule editing is not supported by the public API.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Collection not found (or in a different space).

post.description: Converts a smart collection into a fixed collection containing its current matching links. The collection no longer changes automatically as link state changes. Rejects collections that are already fixed.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

post.summary: Convert a smart collection to manual

delete.description: Removes the listed links from the collection. Links that are not in the collection are no-ops. Smart collections reject explicit membership changes.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

422.description: Validation failed or the collection rejects explicit membership changes.

get.description: Returns links in the collection. Smart collections are evaluated against the space's current links at request time. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`; same vocabulary as the space link list). Keyset pagination uses `cursor` and `limit` (1–1000, default 50; server clamps); a cursor is only valid under the sort that issued it. Pass `include=clicks` for `clicks`/`lastClickedAt` on every row.

parameters.description: Extra row data. `clicks` adds `clicks` and `lastClickedAt` to every row.
parameters.name: include

schema.description: Extra row data. `clicks` adds `clicks` and `lastClickedAt` to every row.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

post.description: Adds the listed links to the collection. Re-adding a link that is already in the collection counts as `alreadyMember`, not an error. Smart collections reject explicit membership changes.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

422.description: Validation failed, the collection rejects explicit membership changes, or a link is outside the space.

get.description: Returns the enabled short domains this space can use. Pass a returned `hostname` or `id` as the `domain` field when creating a link, or omit `domain` to use the space's default domain.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

get.description: Returns links in the space. Each row includes canonical `shortUrl` for display, copy, and navigation, plus `hostname` and `path` fields for callers that store URL components separately. Order via `sort` (default `creation-date-desc`); click-based sorts order by the space's click analytics. Keyset pagination via the opaque `cursor` query param — pass back the `nextCursor` from the prior response to advance (a cursor is only valid under the sort that issued it). Defaults to 50 per page, clamped to 1000. Pass `include=clicks` to get `clicks` and `lastClickedAt` on every row (click-based sorts include them automatically).

parameters.description: Filter to a single short domain (dom_* id).
parameters.name: shortDomain

schema.description: Filter to a single short domain (dom_* id).

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response. Only valid with the same `sort` it was issued under.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response. Only valid with the same `sort` it was issued under.

parameters.description: Extra row data. `clicks` adds `clicks` and `lastClickedAt` to every row.
parameters.name: include

schema.description: Extra row data. `clicks` adds `clicks` and `lastClickedAt` to every row.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

post.description: Creates a short link in the named space. `domain` is an optional hostname or `dom_*` id (e.g. "zlnk.to", from `GET …/domains`); omit it to use the space's default domain. `collection` is an optional `col_*` id or exact collection name; duplicate names require an id. Rule-based collections returned by the API do not accept explicit link additions. When `path` is omitted, Zebra allocates one under the requested namespace, or the root namespace by default.

parameters.description: When `true`, probe the target once after creating the link and report `targetReachable` in the response. Adds a network round-trip; off by default. Never blocks creation.
parameters.name: verify

schema.description: When `true`, probe the target once after creating the link and report `targetReachable` in the response. Adds a network round-trip; off by default. Never blocks creation.

402.description: Space is read-only — no active subscription.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

422.description: Validation failed or the path, domain, collection, or URL was rejected.

delete.description: Deletes up to 250 links by id. Rows fail independently: an id that is missing or belongs to a different space returns `LINK_NOT_FOUND` for that row only; the rest still delete. Deletion is permanent; clicks already recorded are unaffected.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

delete.summary: Delete many links in one request

patch.description: Updates multiple links. Each `updates[]` row carries a `linkId` and the partial fields to patch, using the same body fields as single-link PATCH. Rows fail independently with per-row error envelopes.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

patch.summary: Patch many links in one request

post.description:
Creates up to 250 links. Each row gets its own result; a malformed URL or unavailable custom path fails only that row. Set `collection` to a `col_*` id or exact collection name to add every created link to that collection; duplicate names require an id. Rule-based collections returned by the API do not accept explicit link additions.

Bulk creation validates URL shape and path availability only. It does not probe each target URL, so no `targetReachable` field is returned. `title` is used when supplied.

The batch counts atomically against the space's link-volume limits: a batch that would cross the per-minute or monthly cap is rejected whole with HTTP 429 and zero links created. Per-minute rejections carry a `Retry-After` header; `error.details.remaining` reports the headroom left in the window so a smaller batch can be sized.

200.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

207.description: Per-row results. HTTP 200 when every row succeeded or every row failed; HTTP 207 (Multi-Status) when the batch was partially successful. Inspect each row's `success` field to dispatch on the outcome.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

429.description: The batch would cross the space's link-volume limits (`RATE_LIMITED`); rejected whole, zero links created. `error.details` carries `scope` and `remaining`; per-minute rejections also set a `Retry-After` header.

post.summary: Create many links in one request

get.description: Resolves a short link's identity to exactly one link — for acting on a link you only have the short URL for. Pass `url` (a full short URL or `host/path`), or `domain`+`key`, or a bare `key` when the space uses a single domain. Deterministic, never fuzzy: it returns the one match or a 404. A link on a domain since disabled still resolves. A bare `key` while the space uses more than one domain returns `AMBIGUOUS_DOMAIN` (the candidate domains ride in `details.domains`).

parameters.description: A full short URL or `host/path` (e.g. `zbrah.link/launch`). Mutually exclusive with `domain`/`key`.
parameters.name: url

schema.description: A full short URL or `host/path` (e.g. `zbrah.link/launch`). Mutually exclusive with `domain`/`key`.

parameters.description: Short-domain hostname or `dom_*` id. Pairs with `key`.
parameters.name: domain

schema.description: Short-domain hostname or `dom_*` id. Pairs with `key`.

parameters.description: The link's path/key (with or without a leading slash). Resolves without `domain` only when the space uses a single domain.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: The link's path/key (with or without a leading slash). Resolves without `domain` only when the space uses a single domain.

400.description: Missing/conflicting query, unparseable `url`, or `AMBIGUOUS_DOMAIN` (a bare key while the space uses more than one domain).

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

get.summary: Resolve a short URL to its link

post.description: Find links by any combination of filters — destination host, short domain, status, click thresholds, date windows, attribution, and more. POST (not GET) because of the nested and array-valued filters. An empty body matches every link. Results page via `limit`/`offset` and report the true `total`. `negate` inverts named structured dimensions, so this returns the same links as a smart collection built from the same filter. Weighs more than a plain read against the per-minute rate budget.

staleLinks.summary: Active links not clicked in the last 30 days

200.description: Matching links plus the true total.

400.description: Unknown domain in the filter, or invalid JSON.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

delete.description: Permanently deletes the named link. A linkId in a different space returns 404.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

get.description: Returns one link with canonical `shortUrl` for display, copy, and navigation, plus `hostname` and `path` fields for callers that store URL components separately. A linkId that exists in a different space returns 404.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

patch.description: Patches the named link. Every body field is optional — omitting one leaves that field unchanged. `title: null` clears the title; `title: undefined` (omitting it) doesn't touch it. A linkId that exists in a different space returns 404 (existence is not leaked).

402.description: Space is read-only — no active subscription.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

422.description: Validation failed or the path or URL was rejected.

get.description: Returns the link's named QR designs in display order, plus the space default style. The FIRST variant is the link's effective default — what renders when no `variant` is specified anywhere. Each variant carries its stable public `imageUrls`. A link with zero variants still renders a code (the space default, else the stock look) — fetch it from the link's `/qr/image` endpoint, or export it for a public URL.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

post.description: Adds a named design to the link. `style` is the sparse design vocabulary (canonical JSON); omit it (or send null) for a design that renders the space default look.

402.description: Space is read-only — no active subscription.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link not found (or in a different space).

delete.description: Deletes the named design. A link with zero remaining variants still renders its default code.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link or QR variant not found (a variant on a different link reads as 404).

patch.description: Patches the named design. Omit a field to leave it unchanged; `style: null` clears the design back to the space default look.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link or QR variant not found (a variant on a different link reads as 404).

get.description: Renders one named design at any size/format, encoding the link's canonical short URL. Live: restyling the variant in the studio changes what it renders next. Authenticated — for a key-free URL to embed or hand off, use the variant's stable `imageUrls`.

parameters.description: PNG edge length in pixels (ignored for SVG). Clamped to 64–2048; default 1024.
parameters.name: size

schema.description: PNG edge length in pixels (ignored for SVG). Clamped to 64–2048; default 1024.

200.description: The rendered code. Sends an `ETag`; a matching `If-None-Match` returns 304 without re-rendering.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link or QR variant not found.

502.description: The code could not be rendered (e.g. an uploaded mark is no longer reachable).

get.summary: Get a QR variant as an image

post.description: Resolves a design, refreshes its stable public files, and returns their URLs — key-free, CDN-served, -embeddable, one PNG and one SVG per design. The URLs are permanent and always serve the design's latest saved look: saving in the studio rewrites the same files in place (also returned as `imageUrls` on the variant endpoints, so most callers never need this endpoint after the first materialization). Need a copy frozen in time? Download the file. Without `variant`, the link's effective default design exports — its first saved variant, else the space default/stock look. The image encodes only the link's public short URL.

201.description: Files refreshed; the URLs are live immediately.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the API key is not authorized for the requested space (`SPACE_NOT_ACCESSIBLE`), or its scope is too narrow for this operation (`INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE`) — a read-only key is refused on write endpoints (POST / PATCH / DELETE).

404.description: Link or QR variant not found.

501.description: File storage is not configured on this deployment.

502.description: The code could not be rendered or stored.

post.summary: Get a design's stable public image URLs

get.description: Renders the link's code at any size/format — the endpoint a publishing pipeline pairs with link creation. Without `variant`, the link's effective default design renders: its first saved variant, else the space default, else the stock look (what the studio shows first). The image always encodes the link's canonical short URL. Authenticated and rendered per request — for a key-free URL to embed or hand off, use the design's stable `imageUrls` (variant endpoints / `/qr/export`).

parameters.description: PNG edge length in pixels (ignored for SVG). Clamped to 64–2048; default 1024.
parameters.name: size
